title: PyTorch 2.12.0 Release
summary: PyTorch 2.12.0 发布，torch.export.save 首次支持 Microscaling (MX) 量化格式，新增 torch.accelerator.Graph 统一后端 API，torch.cond 可在 CUDA Graphs 中捕获回放，Adagrad 支持 fused=True，最低 CUDA 12.6 + C++20。
body_digest: torch.export.save now supports Microscaling (MX) quantization formats, enabling full export of aggressively compressed models
New torch.accelerator.Graph API unifies graph capture and replay across CUDA, XPU, and out-of-tree backends
Batched linalg.eigh on CUDA is up to 100x faster due to updated cuSolver backend selection
torch.cond control flow can now be captured and replayed inside CUDA Graphs
Minimum CUDA version bumped to 12.6, C++20 enforced
key_excerpt: torch.export.save now supports Microscaling (MX) quantization formats, enabling full export of aggressively compressed models.
student_readability: MX 量化格式概念对本科生可读，torch.export 细节需要 PyTorch 基础
current_stage_relation: 当前在学神经网络基础，暂时不需要 torch.export，但 MX 量化是 3-6 个月后需要掌握的核心技能

title: Needle: 26M Function Call Model for Tiny Devices
summary: 将 Gemini 的工具调用（function calling）能力蒸馏到仅 26M 参数的 Gemma 小模型中，可在极小设备上运行。HN 628 分，GitHub 1293 stars。
body_digest: 26m function call model that runs on incredibly small devices
Uses knowledge distillation from Gemini to train a small Gemma model
Topics: cactus, gemini, gemma, llm, on-device-ai
Python implementation, open source
key_excerpt: 26m function call model that runs on incredibly small devices
student_readability: 本科生可理解蒸馏概念，代码实现需要 Python 和 ML 基础
current_stage_relation: 知识蒸馏是模型压缩核心技术，当前先了解方向，后续可作为复现项目

title: ExecuTorch v1.2.0
summary: ExecuTorch v1.2.0 将 Cortex-M 提升为一等嵌入式目标，集成 CMSIS-NN；Metal 支持 4-bit 量化推理；Vulkan 全面 int8 量化推理；新增 Voxtral Realtime 和 Qwen3.5 支持。
body_digest: Cortex-M as a first-class target with CMSIS-NN integration
Metal backend: 4-bit quantized inference via MLX-derived GEMM kernels
Vulkan backend: comprehensive int8 quantized inference
New model support: Voxtral Realtime, Qwen3.5, Silero VAD
key_excerpt: Cortex-M as a first-class target — Dedicated backend with CMSIS-NN integration, quantized int8 batch matmul and pad
student_readability: Cortex-M 和 STM32 对有裸机经验的本科生可理解，量化细节需要 ML 基础
current_stage_relation: 有 STM32 裸机经验，ExecuTorch Cortex-M 支持意味着未来可直接在 STM32 上跑 AI 模型

title: Search Your Block Floating Point Scales!
summary: 研究如何用 Block Floating Point (BFP) 量化加速生成式模型推理，通过搜索最优 BFP 缩放因子实现高效低精度计算。
body_digest: Quantization as a standard technique for accelerating inference
Block floating point (BFP) format with shared scaling factors
Automatic search for optimal BFP scales
key_excerpt: Quantization has emerged as a standard technique for accelerating inference for generative models by enabling faster low-precision computations
student_readability: 量化概念可理解，BFP 细节需要数字电路/浮点表示基础
current_stage_relation: 量化技术多元化趋势，了解方向即可，暂不深入

title: Elastic Attention Cores for Scalable Vision Transformers
summary: 用弹性注意力核心机制降低 Vision Transformer 的计算复杂度，使 ViT 更适合规模化部署。
body_digest: Vision Transformers achieve strong scaling via all-to-all self-attention
Elastic Attention Cores reduce computational complexity
Aims to maintain ViT performance while reducing cost
key_excerpt: Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong data-driven scaling by leveraging all-to-all self-attention. However, this flexibility incurs a computational cost.
student_readability: ViT 概念需要 Transformer 基础，当前阶段了解方向即可
current_stage_relation: 正在学 CNN，ViT 是另一条视觉模型路线，了解方向即可

title: ONNX Runtime 1.26.0
summary: ONNX Runtime 1.26.0 新增 RISC-V Vector 扩展支持、.ort 模型内存映射加载、WebGPU GridSample、CUDA 12 将在 1.27.0 移除。
body_digest: RISC-V Vector (RVV) support for CPU EP
Memory mapping for .ort model loads
WebGPU GridSample support and Split-K improvements
CUDA 12 support will be removed in 1.27.0
key_excerpt: Added RISC-V Vector (RVV) support for CPU EP
student_readability: RISC-V 和推理引擎概念对本科生可建立方向感
current_stage_relation: 对应 Edge AI 模型部署阶段，先建立工具链地图，暂不急复现

title: KV-Fold: One-Step KV-Cache Recurrence for Long-Context Inference
summary: 训练无关的长上下文推理协议，将 KV-cache 视为左折叠中的累加器，减少内存开销。
body_digest: Training-free long-context inference protocol
Treats KV cache as accumulator in a left fold
Reduces memory overhead for long-context models
key_excerpt: We introduce KV-Fold, a simple, training-free long-context inference protocol
student_readability: 需要 Transformer 注意力机制基础
current_stage_relation: 面向大模型推理优化，了解即可

title: G^2TR: Generation-Guided Visual Token Reduction for UMMs
summary: 通过生成引导的视觉 token 削减降低统一多模态模型的推理成本。
body_digest: Separate-encoder UMMs have growing inference cost from dense visual tokens
Generation-guided token reduction approach
Reduces visual token processing cost
key_excerpt: The development of separate-encoder Unified multimodal models (UMMs) comes with a rapidly growing inference cost due to dense visual token processing.
student_readability: 需要多模态模型基础概念
current_stage_relation: 视觉 token 压缩与端侧推理相关，了解方向即可

title: VIP: Visual-guided Prompt Evolution for Efficient Dense VL Inference
summary: 训练无关的开放词汇语义分割方法，通过视觉引导的提示进化实现高效推理。
body_digest: Training-free open-vocabulary semantic segmentation
Visual-guided prompt evolution for efficiency
Addresses spatial and efficiency challenges
key_excerpt: Pursuing training-free open-vocabulary semantic segmentation in an efficient and generalizable manner remains challenging
student_readability: 需要视觉-语言模型基础
current_stage_relation: 高效视觉-语言推理与端侧部署相关，了解方向即可

title: Efficient Pre-Training with Token Superposition
summary: 通过 token 叠加实现高效预训练，27 个 upvotes。
body_digest: Token superposition for efficient pre-training
27 upvotes on HuggingFace Papers
student_readability: 预训练效率优化，了解方向即可
current_stage_relation: 训练效率方向，暂不影响当前学习

title: Fast Image Super-Resolution via Consistency Rectified Flow
summary: 用一致性修正流加速扩散模型的图像超分辨率推理。
body_digest: Diffusion models for real-world image SR
Consistency rectified flow reduces multi-step inference
Faster single-step or few-step inference
key_excerpt: Diffusion models (DMs) have demonstrated remarkable success in real-world image super-resolution (SR), yet their reliance on time-consuming multi-step inference
current_stage_relation: 图像超分加速可能与端侧相关，了解方向即可

title: TextSeal: LLM Watermark for Distillation Protection
summary: 面向大语言模型的水印技术，用于保护模型不被蒸馏。
body_digest: Watermark for LLM distillation protection
Building on Gumbel-max sampling
Dual-key generation for provenance
key_excerpt: We introduce TextSeal, a state-of-the-art watermark for large language models. Building on Gumbel-max sampling.
current_stage_relation: 与蒸馏方向相关但属于知识产权保护层面，了解即可

title: SigLIP2_compression: Pruning + Quantization + Distillation
summary: SigLIP2 视觉模型压缩实验，使用剪枝、量化和蒸馏方法压缩 ViT 编码器。
body_digest: Compression of ViT encoder in SigLIP2 model
Uses pruning, quantization and distillation methods
key_excerpt: Compression of ViT encoder in SigLIP2 model using pruning, quantization and distillation methods.
student_readability: 压缩技术组合实践，需要基础 ML 知识
current_stage_relation: 视觉模型压缩实践项目，后续可参考

title: on-device-ai-fault-classifier (ESP32-S3)
summary: ESP32-S3 + Edge Impulse 振动故障检测，3 类分类（正常/不平衡/轴承磨损）。
body_digest: 3-class vibration fault detection using Edge Impulse on ESP32-S3
Normal/imbalance/bearing wear classification
key_excerpt: 3-class vibration fault detection (normal/imbalance/bearing wear) using Edge Impulse on ESP32-S3
student_readability: ESP32 与 STM32 同属嵌入式 MCU，振动检测是传感器 AI 的典型应用
current_stage_relation: 与 STM32 裸机经验直接相关，展示了嵌入式 AI 的实际应用场景
